descriptionText: Azimut S10 For Sale 2020| Guest Cabins:4| Crew Cabins:4The Azimut S10 For Sale 2020 represents a well‑balanced blend of contemporary design, thoughtful layout planning and reliable performance. Although this particular yacht is a 2021 model, many prospective buyers searching for an Azimut S10 For Sale 2020 will naturally be interested in this vessel due to its similar styling, configuration and overall appeal within the same generation. She is currently located in China and is in good condition, benefitting from low engine hours and careful ownership.Specifications: • Brand: Azimut • Year: 2021 • Length: 28.7 m • Max. Beam: 6.3 m • Construction: FRP • Draught: 2 m • Gross Tonnage: 155 GT • Location: China • Max. Speed: 35 knots • Fuel Tank: 9,500 l • Water Tank: 1,750 l • Engines: 2 x 2600 hp MTU • Guest Cabins: 4 • Crew: 4The Azimut S10 For Sale 2020 is one of Azimut’s flagship models within the S Series, known for sporty character combined with refined onboard comfort. Measuring 28.7 metres in length with a maximum beam of 6.3 metres, she offers generous space both inside and on deck. Her exterior lines are modern yet understated, giving her a presence that suits both relaxed cruising and more spirited passages. Built in FRP, the yacht is designed to deliver strength without unnecessary weight, contributing to her performance capabilities.One of the key highlights of this Azimut S10 For Sale 2020 is her pair of 2600 hp MTU engines, allowing a maximum speed of 35 knots. For owners who appreciate responsive handling and the ability to cover distances efficiently, this power arrangement offers reassuring capability. With a fuel capacity of 9,500 litres, she is well equipped for longer coastal journeys or island‑hopping itineraries. The water tank capacity of 1,750 litres ensures practical autonomy during extended stays on board.Her interior layout accommodates up to eight guests across four guest cabins, supported by separate crew quarters for four. This arrangement allows owners to enjoy private cruising with family or friends while ensuring smooth onboard operations. The design focus throughout the cabins and communal spaces emphasises natural light, comfortable proportions and a calm atmosphere. Materials and detailing follow Azimut’s well‑known approach to modern Italian styling with a subtle, welcoming tone.One of the standout features of the Azimut S10 For Sale 2020 design is the open‑air terrace concept, which offers a flexible space connecting guests directly to the sea. Whether used for informal dining, relaxing with a view or accommodating social gatherings, the terrace becomes a central part of life on board. More secluded areas are also integrated into the layout for moments requiring privacy and quiet.This particular yacht is noteworthy for being in pristine condition with less than 150 engine hours. She has been carefully maintained and is available for immediate transaction. For buyers looking at an Azimut S10 For Sale 2020, this 2021 model presents an appealing opportunity to acquire a vessel of similar specification yet with remarkably low usage and a well‑preserved overall state.
descriptionHtml:
Azimut S10 For Sale 2020| Guest Cabins:4| Crew Cabins:4

The Azimut S10 For Sale 2020 represents a well‑balanced blend of contemporary design, thoughtful layout planning and reliable performance. Although this particular yacht is a 2021 model, many prospective buyers searching for an Azimut S10 For Sale 2020 will naturally be interested in this vessel due to its similar styling, configuration and overall appeal within the same generation. She is currently located in China and is in good condition, benefitting from low engine hours and careful ownership.

Specifications:
• Brand: Azimut
• Year: 2021
• Length: 28.7 m
• Max. Beam: 6.3 m
• Construction: FRP
• Draught: 2 m
• Gross Tonnage: 155 GT
• Location: China
• Max. Speed: 35 knots
• Fuel Tank: 9,500 l
• Water Tank: 1,750 l
• Engines: 2 x 2600 hp MTU
• Guest Cabins: 4
• Crew: 4

The Azimut S10 For Sale 2020 is one of Azimut’s flagship models within the S Series, known for sporty character combined with refined onboard comfort. Measuring 28.7 metres in length with a maximum beam of 6.3 metres, she offers generous space both inside and on deck. Her exterior lines are modern yet understated, giving her a presence that suits both relaxed cruising and more spirited passages. Built in FRP, the yacht is designed to deliver strength without unnecessary weight, contributing to her performance capabilities.

One of the key highlights of this Azimut S10 For Sale 2020 is her pair of 2600 hp MTU engines, allowing a maximum speed of 35 knots. For owners who appreciate responsive handling and the ability to cover distances efficiently, this power arrangement offers reassuring capability. With a fuel capacity of 9,500 litres, she is well equipped for longer coastal journeys or island‑hopping itineraries. The water tank capacity of 1,750 litres ensures practical autonomy during extended stays on board.

Her interior layout accommodates up to eight guests across four guest cabins, supported by separate crew quarters for four. This arrangement allows owners to enjoy private cruising with family or friends while ensuring smooth onboard operations. The design focus throughout the cabins and communal spaces emphasises natural light, comfortable proportions and a calm atmosphere. Materials and detailing follow Azimut’s well‑known approach to modern Italian styling with a subtle, welcoming tone.

One of the standout features of the Azimut S10 For Sale 2020 design is the open‑air terrace concept, which offers a flexible space connecting guests directly to the sea. Whether used for informal dining, relaxing with a view or accommodating social gatherings, the terrace becomes a central part of life on board. More secluded areas are also integrated into the layout for moments requiring privacy and quiet.

This particular yacht is noteworthy for being in pristine condition with less than 150 engine hours. She has been carefully maintained and is available for immediate transaction. For buyers looking at an Azimut S10 For Sale 2020, this 2021 model presents an appealing opportunity to acquire a vessel of similar specification yet with remarkably low usage and a well‑preserved overall state.
